generator: inbox-eval-gen v1 (Mistral EU, full); operator-must-run inbox-eval-lint before merge
note: PRD-INBOX-PHASE-3 §"Classification Tuning". Re-run only when prompt or model bumps invalidate the corpus.
antiPiiNote: Surnames (Lopez, Schmidt, Wilson, …) were synthesized by Mistral Phase-1 and may coincide with real names — no customer data was input. Sender domains beyond `*.example` are also Mistral-invented. The `inbox-eval-lint.ts` script flags both as findings for operator review; this corpus ships with them because their privacy risk on a public OSS fixture is low (synthesized, not extracted). If a coincidence with a real lynox customer ever surfaces, regenerate. Brand domains (lynox.*, brandfusion.*) WERE manually scrubbed.
operatorRelabels: info-share-de-117 (compliance_notification): Phase-2 labeler emitted requires_user because of 'Bitte lesen Sie' wording, but the body has no deadline + no required action. Re-labeled to auto_handled (2026-05-12).
